qas.a: a process of identifying critical information and subsequently analyzing friendly actions attendant to military operations and other activities.

qas.q: What is the goal of OPSEC?
qas.a: to identify information and observable activities relating to mission capabilities, limitations, and intentions in order to prevent exploitation by our adversaries.

qas.q: Which security programs does OPSEC encompass?
qas.a:
Communication security (COMSEC).
Network and computer security (COMPUSEC).
Information security (INFOSEC).
Physical security.
Emissions security (EMSEC).

qas.q:
Which security program is covered under AFI 10-701?
a. OPSEC.
b. EMSEC.
c. COMSEC.
d. COMPUSEC.

Which of the following security programs is defined as a process of identifying critical
information and subsequently analyzing friendly actions attendant to military operations and
other activities?
a. OPSEC.
b. EMSEC.
c. COMSEC.
d. COMPUSEC.
